chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.490 of 2017 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.106/2022. 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.2961/17. -------------------------------------------------------------- 24.03.2022. Mr. Jehangir Rahujo, Advocate for the applicant along with Mr. Aslam Khan, Admin Officer. Mr. Muhammad Idrees Jakhrani, Advocate for the respondents No. 1 to 4. >><< Counter affidavit filed on behalf of the respondents No.1 to 4 is taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this Special Sales Tax Reference Application as he wants to file a fresh petition to challenge the certain provisions of law. The instant SCRA is dismissed as not pressed along with the listed applications. Learned counsel for the applicant is at liberty to seek the remedy as provided to him under the law. JUDGE JUDGE
